evidence.snippet:
### UAV Cells & Packs
Ultra-lightweight, lithium-sulfur propulsion for Unmanned Aerial Systems. U.S. sourced and manufactured using no nickel, manganese, cobalt or graphite (NDAA compliant).

*   _**Lyten allocating manufacturing capacity in its California production facilities to meet needs of U.S. defense, UAV, and satellite sectors.**_
*   _**Lyten now taking orders for its latest lithium-sulfur battery for unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs).**_

items.notes: Lithium-sulfur and lithium-ion battery cells and packs for UAVs/UAS, as well as large-scale BESS products (Voltpack, Voltrack).

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Lyten sells lithium-sulfur battery cells and packs that power drones built by others (e.g., Titan Dynamics). They do not manufacture drone airframes.

items.name: Lithium-Sulfur Cells
items.product_type: High energy density lithium-sulfur battery cells

evidence.snippet:
### Lithium-Sulfur Cells
High energy density. Light weight. Sourced and manufactured in the US using industrial by-products.

### Lithium-ion Cells
High-performance lithium-ion cells tailored to customer specifications.

items.name: Voltpack Mobile System
items.product_type: Modular battery energy storage system (BESS), 281–1,405 kWh

evidence.snippet:
### Voltpack Mobile System
A stand-alone, modular system designed as a plug and play energy storage solution at the edge. Scalable from 281 kWh to 1,405 kWh for commercial, industrial and data centers. Made in Poland.

items.name: Voltrack
items.product_type: Energy storage rack for BESS integration

evidence.snippet:
### Voltrack
A flexible energy storage rack designed for safety and ready for integration into a wide range BESS solutions. Certified for global integration. Made in Poland.

evidence.snippet:
### [Structural Adhesive](/products/structural-adhesive/)
High-Strength Structural Bonding Powered by Supermaterials.
Ultra-lightweight, lithium-sulfur propulsion for Unmanned Aerial Systems. U.S. sourced and manufactured using no nickel, manganese, cobalt or graphite (NDAA compliant).

Lyten’s lithium-sulfur batteries are free from nickel, manganese, cobalt, and graphite — minerals dominated by Chinese supply chains — enabling a secure, National Defense Appropriations Act (NDAA)-compliant energy solution for defense platforms. Lithium-Sulfur batteries, with their higher energy density, are designed to support longer flights, heavier payloads, and extended operational range.

ndaa.notes: UAV/UAS battery cells explicitly described as 'NDAA compliant' on product page and in press release (free of nickel, manganese, cobalt, graphite).

evidence.snippet: *   _**Lyten now taking orders for its latest lithium-sulfur battery for unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs).**_
Li-S for UAVs is available today. Contact us to learn more.

readiness.notes: Lyten is currently taking orders for drone Li-S batteries and allocating production capacity in California facilities. Also manufacturing BESS products in Poland.

tagline: Manufactures US-sourced lithium-sulfur and lithium-ion battery cells and packs for unmanned systems (NDAA-compliant); also produces 3D graphene-enhanced filament, adhesives, and concrete admixture. Recently acquired Northvolt Sweden assets. Public evidence on current UAS program integration and production volumes is limited.
